_comment: You only need the keys for operations you plan to use. Remove unused sections.

signing.mnemonic: <BIP39 mnemonic phrase - 12 or 24 words, used for --sign-type cli and --witness-eth>
signing.did_key: <0x-prefixed 32-byte Ed25519 private key hex, used for --sign-type did. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32>
signing.p256_key: <0x-prefixed 32-byte P-256 private key hex, used for --sign-type p256. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32>
signing.secp256k1_key: <0x-prefixed 32-byte secp256k1 private key hex, used for EIP-191 signing. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32>

timestamp.nostr_sk: <Nostr secret key as hex or nsec bech32, used for --witness-nostr. Generate: openssl rand -hex 32>
